reasoning: Emotional (60%): The bomb reads as bright, warm, and charming — saturated teal-blue round body, pink bunny-ear fuse, orange clock-face detail, warm brown base. Round silhouette gives toy-diorama quality. Palette is vibrant and Hyrule-appropriate; zero grimness. Score ~8.5/10 on emotional axis. Technical (40%): Hard 1px outlines are consistent and visible at all zoom levels. Blue body exhibits a clear 3-tone hard shading (highlight, mid, shadow) with no anti-aliasing blur. Pixels are grid-snapped; hand-pixeled craft is evident. Readability holds at small size. Compared to Denzi tech-items reference, the pixel discipline and shading structure are comparable, though the palette is intentionally much brighter to match the Zelda: Echoes of Wisdom mood. Minor note: the pink ears are thin and slightly hard to read at 1x, but do not significantly detract. Score ~7.5/10 on technical axis. Weighted: 0.6*8.5 + 0.4*7.5 = 5.1+3.0 = 8.1 → rounded to 8. Pass.
